title: Exact non-instruction configuration shape for .claude/launch.json
description: The ONLY file under a tool-local instruction directory that the instruction boundary may accept. It is accepted because of this schema, not because of its name: `additionalProperties: false` at every level means the document can carry dev-server launch configuration and nothing else. There is no field in which a prompt, a persona, a rule, a system message or an instruction override could be smuggled, so accepting this exact file cannot shadow the root instructions.
